items.prompt: A 3-person startup has a 3-month deadline. Argue the case for building authentication in-house: the concrete advantages, the risks of adopting a managed provider, and the conditions under which in-house is the right call. Be specific and concise.

A 3-person startup has a 3-month deadline. Argue the case for adopting a managed auth provider (e.g. Auth0 or Clerk): the concrete advantages, the risks of building in-house, and the conditions under which managed is the right call. Be specific and concise.
